description: Product source-of-truth catalog. Lifecycle status for Sense360 product configurations. Validated by tests/test_product_catalog.py. config/webflash-builds.json remains the authoritative WebFlash build matrix; this catalog adds the lifecycle layer on top. PRODUCT-002 extends the catalog to enumerate every legacy/manual product YAML under products/ as legacy-compatible. legacy-compatible entries are NOT WebFlash-shippable: they have no config_string, no artifact_name, no webflash_wrapper, and webflash_build_matrix is false. WebFlash wrappers under products/webflash/ are not standalone products; they appear only as webflash_wrapper on the entry they wrap.

products.notes: Release-One production target. FanTRIAC blocked per HW-005; LED excluded because config string carries no LED token. See docs/release-one.md and docs/release-one-hardware-audit.md.

products.reason: FanTRIAC hardware mapping unresolved: S360-320 schematic uncommitted; placeholder GPIO5/GPIO6 collide with RoomIQ J10 nets; ESPHome ac_dimmer cannot run across the SX1509 expander.
products.notes: Advanced/manual-warning candidate after HW-005 unblock, HW-PINMAP-320-FOLLOWUP, PACKAGE-TRIAC-001, COMPLIANCE-001 advanced/manual-warning sign-off, and WebFlash-side manual-warning UX gates clear. Not Release-One, not REQUIRED_CONFIGS, not recommended, not kit/default, not compliance-certified. Retained as documented hardware; blocked from standard exposure until gates clear. See docs/release-one-hardware-audit.md#fantriac-mapping-resolution and docs/hardware/s360-320-r4-triac.md#advanced--manual-warning-product-posture.

FanRelay product YAML added by PRODUCT-RELAY-001 as an advanced/manual-warning-only sibling of Release-One. PACKAGE-RELAY-001 / PR #562 implemented the FanRelay package at the package layer only; product-layer blockers remain open (production-wide / multi-unit ESP32-S3 GPIO3 strap-pin boot-behaviour characterisation; board-level mains-safety / installation-approval / creepage / clearance / thermal / EMI / EMC evidence; competent-person caveat sign-off). NOT release-one, NOT REQUIRED_CONFIGS, NOT recommended, NOT kit-default, NOT compliance-certified, NOT WebFlash-exposed. webflash_build_matrix is false; no artifact_name; no webflash_wrapper; no config/webflash-builds.json entry; no release artifact. WebFlash exposure (if and when appropriate) is owned by a separate WEBFLASH-RELAY-001 slice gated additionally on production-wide hardware characterisation + installation / competent-person sign-off + WebFlash-side manual-warning UX parity. The default sellable bathroom kit remains S360-KIT-BATH-POE (Release-One); S360-KIT-BATH-RELAY stays future-expansion / hardware-pending. See docs/product-readiness-matrix.md §FanRelay / S360-310, docs/webflash-exposure-readiness-matrix.md §Relay / S360-310 WebFlash posture, docs/release-artifact-readiness-matrix.md §Relay / S360-310 release posture. MANUAL-FIRMWARE-CANDIDATE-001 (2026-05-27): the top-level product YAML products/sense360-ceiling-poe-ventiq-fanrelay-roomiq.yaml is now recorded as a manual / no-WebFlash firmware candidate — the product YAML is present, structurally validated (tests/test_relay_product_readiness.py), and full-compile validated (its registered compile-only target ceiling-poe-ventiq-fanrelay-roomiq-compile-only carries compile_validation_status validated-full-compile, recorded from the committed FW-FULL-COMPILE-TOPLEVEL-FANS-001 / PR #616 full-lane run in which this top-level product YAML was target #8, rc=0, Flash 53.8% / 987219 bytes). Manual / no-WebFlash firmware candidate means only that the YAML compiles and can be installed manually (local esphome compile/upload or a remote-package include): it is NOT a release artifact, NOT WebFlash exposure or import, NOT hardware-stable, NOT compliance / mains-safety / competent-person approval, and NOT kit-default / recommended / Release-One readiness. status stays hardware-pending; webflash_build_matrix stays false; no artifact_name; no webflash_wrapper; no release artifact; no .bin / checksum. WEBFLASH-RELAY-001 / RELEASE-RELAY-001 / WF-IMPORT-RELAY-001 stay blocked.

FanDAC (0-10V / Cloudlift S12 fan control) product YAML added by PRODUCT-DAC-001 as the product-YAML-only / no-WebFlash-exposure slice. Composes Core ceiling + PoE PSU + base/health with the canonical FanDAC alias packages/expansions/fan_dac.yaml -> fan_gp8403.yaml (two GP8403 DACs / four neutral outputs). PACKAGE-DAC-001 / PR #573 implemented the package at the package layer; FW-COMPILE-DAC-001 / PR #575 fixed the gp8403 voltage enum (0-10V -> 10V) and added the Ceiling-POE-FanDAC compile-only target; FW-COMPILE-DAC-RESULT-001 / PR #576 recorded the compile-only METADATA lane green (Run ID 26332462496, conclusion success, target count 9). FW-COMPILE-DAC-FULL-RESULT-001 / PR #580 then recorded the full ESPHome compile green and COMPILE-STATUS-FLAGS-001 / PR #581 flipped the config flag, so the full FanDAC compile is now validated by run 26364679370 (workflow_dispatch / compile_mode=full, target count 9, conclusion success) and compile_validation_status is validated-full-compile (superseding the prior metadata-only run 26332462496 marker). NOT release-one, NOT REQUIRED_CONFIGS, NOT recommended, NOT kit-default, NOT compliance-certified, NOT hardware-stable-ready, NOT WebFlash-exposed. webflash_build_matrix is false; no artifact_name; no webflash_wrapper; no config/webflash-builds.json entry; no release artifact. WEBFLASH-DAC-001, RELEASE-DAC-001, and WF-IMPORT-DAC-001 stay BLOCKED. Enforces the FanDAC <-> AirIQ mutex (no AirIQ token; any Ceiling-POE-AirIQ-FanDAC-* is invalid-combination). Carries the J3 out0/out1 silkscreen transposition caveat and the Cloudlift S12 harness/product-bench caveat. No simultaneous per-output 0-5V + 0-10V on one GP8403 is claimed (one V5V reference / one range register per chip). Nextion/J7 display out of scope (no uart:/display: bound). The duct-fan kit S360-KIT-DUCT-0-10V stays future-expansion / hardware-pending. See docs/product-readiness-matrix.md §FanDAC / S360-312, docs/webflash-exposure-readiness-matrix.md §DAC / S360-312 WebFlash posture, docs/release-artifact-readiness-matrix.md §DAC / S360-312 release posture, docs/hardware/s360-312-r4-fandac.md. MANUAL-FIRMWARE-CANDIDATE-001 (2026-05-27): the top-level product YAML products/sense360-ceiling-poe-fandac.yaml is now recorded as a manual / no-WebFlash firmware candidate — present, structurally validated (tests/test_dac_product_readiness.py), and full-compile validated (its registered top-level compile-only target ceiling-poe-fandac-product-compile-only carries compile_validation_status validated-full-compile per FW-FULL-COMPILE-TOPLEVEL-FANS-001 / PR #616, rc=0, Flash 50.6% / 927815 bytes). Manual / no-WebFlash firmware candidate means only that the YAML compiles and can be installed manually: it is NOT a release artifact, NOT WebFlash exposure or import, NOT hardware-stable, NOT compliance / safety approval, and NOT Cloudlift-ready. status stays hardware-pending; webflash_build_matrix stays false; no artifact_name; no webflash_wrapper; no release artifact. WEBFLASH-DAC-001 / RELEASE-DAC-001 / WF-IMPORT-DAC-001 stay blocked.

FanPWM (four-channel 12V PWM fan-speed control) product YAML added by PRODUCT-PWM-001 as the product-YAML-only / no-WebFlash-exposure slice. Composes Core ceiling + PoE PSU + base/health with the canonical PWM-drive-only FanPWM package packages/expansions/fan_pwm.yaml (four independent SX1509 PWM-drive fan-speed controllers fan_pwm_1..4 on neutral outputs fan_pwm_drive_1..4, channels 0..3) which composes the neutral binding packages/expansions/fan_pwm_sx1509.yaml. PACKAGE-PWM-001-IMPLEMENT-001 / PR #590 implemented the package at the package layer (PWM-drive-only scope); FW-COMPILE-PWM-001 / PR #591 added the Ceiling-POE-FanPWM compile-only target; FW-COMPILE-PWM-RESULT-001 / PR #592 recorded the full ESPHome compile green, so the full FanPWM compile is validated by run 26414398902 (Compile-only Firmware Validation, compile_mode=full, 10 targets, conclusion success) and the compile-only target carries compile_validation_status validated-full-compile with rpm_supported false. NOT release-one, NOT REQUIRED_CONFIGS, NOT recommended, NOT kit-default, NOT compliance-certified, NOT hardware-stable-ready, NOT WebFlash-exposed. webflash_build_matrix is false; no artifact_name; no webflash_wrapper; no config/webflash-builds.json entry; no release artifact. WEBFLASH-PWM-001, RELEASE-PWM-001, and WF-IMPORT-PWM-001 stay BLOCKED. RPM is NOT supported: the package wires no pulse_counter and no per-fan or aggregate RPM (an SX1509 expander pin is compile-proven unable to back an ESPHome pulse_counter per PWM-SX1509-TACH-PROOF-001 / PR #589); TachIO / GPIO16 stays reserved/pending; per-fan RPM is deferred to COMPONENT-SX1509-TACH-001 or a bench-confirmed TachIO follow-up. Bench gates stay open: PWM polarity pending; per-fan / aggregate current and thermal envelope pending; product bench not complete. S360-311 schematic_status stays cataloged_unverified (SELV low-voltage board, 5V -> 12V boost; no mains, so COMPLIANCE-001 does not gate FanPWM). The FW-COMPILE-PWM-001 compile-only skeleton at products/compile-only/ceiling-poe-fanpwm.yaml stays the separate CI validation target. See docs/product-readiness-matrix.md §FanPWM / S360-311, docs/webflash-exposure-readiness-matrix.md §PWM / S360-311 WebFlash posture, docs/release-artifact-readiness-matrix.md §PWM / S360-311 release posture, docs/hardware/s360-311-r4-pwm.md. MANUAL-FIRMWARE-CANDIDATE-001 (2026-05-27): the top-level product YAML products/sense360-ceiling-poe-fanpwm.yaml is now recorded as a manual / no-WebFlash firmware candidate — present, structurally validated (tests/test_pwm_product_readiness.py), and full-compile validated (its registered top-level compile-only target ceiling-poe-fanpwm-product-compile-only carries compile_validation_status validated-full-compile per FW-FULL-COMPILE-TOPLEVEL-FANS-001 / PR #616, rc=0, Flash 51.1% / 937775 bytes). Manual / no-WebFlash firmware candidate means only that the YAML compiles and can be installed manually: it is NOT a release artifact, NOT WebFlash exposure or import, NOT hardware-stable, NOT compliance / safety approval, and NOT RPM support. status stays hardware-pending; webflash_build_matrix stays false; no artifact_name; no webflash_wrapper; no release artifact. WEBFLASH-PWM-001 / RELEASE-PWM-001 / WF-IMPORT-PWM-001 stay blocked.

LED-bearing sibling product promoted to a preview build by PRODUCT-009. PRODUCT-006 added the canonical YAML; PRODUCT-008 added the WebFlash wrapper at products/webflash/ceiling-poe-ventiq-roomiq-led.yaml and promoted the catalog entry from compile-only to preview with webflash_build_matrix=false. PRODUCT-009 now flips webflash_build_matrix to true, declares version=1.0.0 / channel=preview / artifact_name=Sense360-Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ-LED-v1.0.0-preview.bin, and adds the matching entry to config/webflash-builds.json on the preview (non-stable) channel. No firmware artifact is built or imported by PRODUCT-009; that build / release proof remains outstanding. Release-One stays Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ on stable (LED-less); FanTRIAC stays blocked under HW-005 and is carried in this entry's blocked_modules. Hardware evidence: S360-300 schematic_status=verified (HW-008); ceiling LED package binds led_data_pin=GPIO38 (HW-010); LED_DATA / Sense360 LED firmware-package mapping is confirmed-ok after HW-010 (HW-009). Bench-verification Open Questions in docs/hardware/s360-300-r4-led.md (harness rail, LED count, harness identity) remain carried as preview-stage caveats and must resolve before any production promotion. See docs/product-led-preview-decision.md.
